case_title: ANDERSON RETA VS MCFARLANCH CAROL A.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLANCH CAROL A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLANCH CAROL A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $625.00 FILED BY ANDERSON RETA AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLANCH CAROL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLANCH CAROL A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON RETA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFARLANCH CAROL A. $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
